purpose: Regression inputs for PDF translation/backfill workflow contracts. These are anchors, not algorithm-specific constants.
anti_overfit_rule: Do not bind behavior to sample filename, exact page number, exact text, fixed coordinates, colors, or known document identity. Use these files only to verify generic contracts and record evidence.

inputs.allowed_use: validate process and product-quality gates on the original single-page timeline case; sample facts must not become generic rules
validate generalization across charts, pies, tables, body paragraphs, footnotes and side navigation; sample facts must stay in manifests/reports
